info.title: dotnet bump-all
info.description: A dotnet-cli command that bumps the version number of the current project. This is useful when working with multiple .NET Core projects placed in different solutions, referencing each other as NuGet packages.

commands.name: major
commands.description: Increase in one the major part of the version.

options.name: -s
options.description: Use <VersionPrefix> instead <Version> tag to bump the version.

options.name: --value
options.description: Bump version to a fixed value, instead of incrementing by 1.

commands.name: minor
commands.description: Increase in one the minor part of the version.

options.name: -s
options.description: Use <VersionPrefix> instead <Version> tag to bump the version.

options.name: --value
options.description: Bump version to a fixed value, instead of incrementing by 1.
